title: US phases out international student crisis protections
summary_en: The US government has quietly phased out a policy that provided regulatory exemptions for students from regions marred by war, natural disaster or financial crises.
author: Polly Nash
title_cn: US phases out international student crisis protections

title: MPs warn UK university insolvency risk grows amid international student pressures
summary_en: UK MPs have raised concerns over new visa compliance metrics, the international student levy and lack of government planning for a potential major university collapse.
author: Kim Martin
title_cn: MPs warn UK university insolvency risk grows amid international student pressures

title: India seeks database of outbound students amid global conflicts
summary_en: Amid the Russia-Ukraine war and recent Middle East tensions, India’s ministry of external affairs is reportedly planning a dedicated platform for Indians going abroad for education and employment to strengthen emergency coordination.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: India seeks database of outbound students amid global conflicts

title: Global HE enrolment reaches 269 million as student mobility triples
summary_en: UNESCO’s first Higher Education Global Trends Report highlights rapid growth in global participation and student mobility, even as inequalities, affordability pressures and quality concerns persist.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: Global HE enrolment reaches 269 million as student mobility triples

title: Universities urged to “think differently” as half report enrolment declines
summary_en: A survey of 254 universities across 36 countries has found a significant decline in international enrolments, with institutions pointing to restrictive policies and visa issues as key factors.
author: Kim Martin
title_cn: Universities urged to “think differently” as half report enrolment declines

title: Canada overhauls immigration consultant regulations
summary_en: The Canadian government has announced new rules for immigration consultants including increased penalties, an expanded public register and compensation for victims of dishonest acts.
author: Polly Nash

title: Emerging Futures 9: visa uncertainty reshapes student demand globally
summary_en: More international students are ruling out study destinations earlier because of visa uncertainty, costs and a lack of clarity about what an application will involve, according to new global research from IDP Education.
author: Kim Martin
title_cn: Emerging Futures 9: visa uncertainty reshapes student demand globally

title: Study Group sold to Arete Education
summary_en: Study Group has been acquired by Arete Education, the higher education venture backed by Global University Systems (GUS) and Brightstar Capital Partners.
author: Kim Martin
title_cn: Study Group sold to Arete Education
